// src/components/auth/Signup/forms/InstructorForm.jsx import { useSignup } from '../../../hooks/useSignup'; export default function InstructorForm() { const { handleSignup, isLoading, isError, error } = useSignup(); const onSubmit = (e) => { e.preventDefault(); const formData = new FormData(e.target); let data = Object.fromEntries(formData); data.phoneNumber = Number(data.phone); delete data.phone; data.role = true; handleSignup(data); }; return (
{/* Same fields as student */} {/* CV Upload */} {/* Submit Button */} {/* Error Message */} {isError && (

{error || 'Failed to submit. Please try again.'}

)}
); }
